title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Code Recall
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a stateful failure-resilient service after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.
Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: python object errors lifecycle. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Oop Transaction Boundaries trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.

content.text: For Oop Transaction Boundaries, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Oop Transaction Boundaries applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.
